scripts.encrypt:old: staticrypt src/index.html -d . --short --remember 30 --template-title 'Flomington' --template-instructions 'Enter the lab password to access the fly stock manager.' --template-color-primary '#8b5cf6' --template-color-secondary '#09090b'
scripts.encrypt: staticrypt dist/index.html -d dist --short --remember 30 --template-title 'Flomington' --template-instructions 'Enter the lab password to access the fly stock manager.' --template-color-primary '#8b5cf6' --template-color-secondary '#09090b'
